title: A24 brings the creepy with The Backrooms
author: Séamus Bellamy
summary:
I'll watch pretty much anything with Chiwetel Ejiofor (12 Years a Slave, Dirty Pretty Things, Children of Men) in it. But Chiwetel Ejiofor in an A24 horror flick? Pump it directly into my veins. The Backrooms, which is based on a series of OG YouTube shorts by Kane Parsons, is just over two minutes long. — Read the rest
